title: Sundiver
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Sundiver.jpg|thumb|250px|The ''Sundiver''.]]

The '''''Sundiver''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] in use by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was captained by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]]. [[Wils]] was a crewman onboard the ship.

Near the end of the Wars, it served as [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the fleet assigned to [[High Jedi General/Legends|High Generals]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] and [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]], accompanying them to the [[Rendili system/Legends|Rendili system]] and [[Battle of Rendili|engaging]] rebellious [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] in combat.
